sculk_found.title: Find Sculk blocks in the deep cave (below Y=0) — do not mine them yet, just observe

sculk_scroll_note.title: Note: the Sculk Sickness scroll drops from the Warden (40% chance) — do NOT fight the Warden yet

subtitle.text: The Sculk Sickness has five stages. You do not want to learn them by experience.

description: It comes from prolonged Sculk exposure.
It accumulates silently until the symptoms are obvious.
└ Ambrosia — crafted from specific End materials
└ The Vile Herb (also used in Cursed Eye recipe, Ch12)
└ Sculk Warding scroll (from Warden, Ch08) teaches
└ ▲ DO NOT FIGHT THE WARDEN YET
└ Wait for Ch08. The Warden fight is gated.
▸ For now: note the sculk locations. Do not mine.
The Sculk vibration system wakes the Warden.
▶ Find Sculk blocks in the deep cave [check]
▶ Note the Warden + scroll drop relationship [check]
◇ The Deep Dark biome (Ancient City) contains
the best early loot in the game.
Ch08 will send you there properly.
